app.title: MOS tech 6502 8-bit microprocessor in pure SQL powered by Postgres
app.author: adunk
app.description: An 8-bit microprocessor implemented entirely in SQL.
proposed_tests: Query the 6502 microprocessor using simple queries
Run a simulation with complex queries and measure performance
Compare the results with an FPGA-6502 implementation
Run a test with different SQL dialects and verify results
